  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which focus would you like for this paragraph: (A) sentence-level clarity and style edits, (B) checking logical flow and evidence-claim alignment and flagging overclaims, (C) high-level reframing of thesis/contribution, or (D) novelty/positioning versus prior work?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "A request to look at a paragraph most often targets sentence-level clarity, tone, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "The request is open-ended, so we should surface uncertainty about intent and ask for preferences.",
    "RX.2": "We must avoid overstating what can be inferred from the text or implying conclusions beyond the projection.",
    "RX.3": "We will not perform edits or critique the content and will only map responsibilities as requested.",
    "RX.4": "Care is needed to avoid steering toward analyses that could encourage harmful or privacy-risky interpretations.",
    "RX.5": "Responsibilities should remain traceable to the provided paragraph and explicitly scoped to it."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which focus would you like for this paragraph: (A) sentence-level clarity and style edits, (B) checking logical flow and evidence-claim alignment and flagging overclaims, (C) high-level reframing of thesis/contribution, or (D) novelty/positioning versus prior work?

rationale.R1.6: A request to look at a paragraph most often targets sentence-level clarity, tone, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The request is open-ended, so we should surface uncertainty about intent and ask for preferences.
rationale.RX.2: We must avoid overstating what can be inferred from the text or implying conclusions beyond the projection.
rationale.RX.3: We will not perform edits or critique the content and will only map responsibilities as requested.
rationale.RX.4: Care is needed to avoid steering toward analyses that could encourage harmful or privacy-risky interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibilities should remain traceable to the provided paragraph and explicitly scoped to it.
